ops.text: The `http` extra shipped without jinja2: transformers makes it optional, apply_chat_template needs it, and the offline suite can't catch the gap because every HttpDrafter test injects a stub tokenizer — the real-template render path has zero offline coverage (exactly the refuter's predicted failure class; the live calibration gate caught it). Options for closing the coverage hole: (a) commit a tiny tokenizer fixture (fast tokenizer json + a minimal jinja chat template) and one render test under the http extra; (b) a dev-extra import-graph test asserting the http extra's declared deps satisfy apply_chat_template's requirements; (c) accept live-gate-only coverage and document it in the module docstring. The jinja2 dep itself is being folded into the fix commit 98bf5478 before ship.
